summary: Comprehensive testing of Construction CRM workflow after fixes. All core features working: PM Dashboard loads correctly with stats, team management, material/labour requests. Site Engineer can create material requests with free-text name and labour requests. PM can verify labour requests (->pending_accounts_approval). Accountant can approve labour requests (->accounts_approved). Procurement Credit Ledger shows entries with delivery_date, payment_due_date, and Request Payment button. Vendor Management working with 16 vendors. Backend APIs all passing.

minor.issue: Requires 'role' field in payload - not documented clearly, but working correctly with role included

critical_code_review_comments: PM assign-team endpoint requires 'role' field but error message from Pydantic is helpful
seed_data_creation: Test data created: Material requests (TEST_Steel_TMT_12mm_*, TEST_Cement_OPC_53_*), Labour requests (mason, helper, electrician)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All major fixes verified working: 1) PM Dashboard loads with stats (2 projects, 2 material requests, 1 labour request, 2 team members), 2) Site Engineer can create material requests with free-text material_name (no material_id required), 3) Site Engineer can create labour requests in labour_expenses collection, 4) PM verify labour -> pending_accounts_approval status, 5) Accountant approve labour -> accounts_approved status, 6) Credit Ledger shows Balaji Construction entry with delivery_date (20/3/2026), payment_due_date (19/4/2026), balance ₹14,000, status 'partially paid', 7) Request Payment button shows 'Requested' badge. Vendor Management shows 16 vendors. Rate limiting aggressive - use delays between API calls.

features_tested.PM Dashboard: PASS - Stats cards, Projects list, Material/Labour requests, Team members all loading
features_tested.PM Assign Team: PASS - Works with role field included
features_tested.SE Material Request (free-text): PASS - Creates request with material_name without material_id
features_tested.SE Labour Request: PASS - Creates in labour_expenses collection with correct status flow
features_tested.Credit Ledger: PASS - Shows delivery_date, payment_due_date, is_overdue, Request Pay button
features_tested.Request Payment: PASS - Already requested for test entry, shows 'Requested' badge
features_tested.Vendor Management: PASS - 16 vendors displayed with all details
